zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas於大約1332年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾坎布斯朗時，她的父親Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagard25歲，母親Joan Menteith19歲。她於1362年7月23日與Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1405年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾享年75歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas于大约1332年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾坎布斯朗时，她的父亲Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagard25岁，母亲Joan Menteith19岁。她于1362年7月23日与Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1405年在英国苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾享年75岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Moray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McRae
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of a patronymic from the Gaelic personal name Mac Raith ‘son of grace or prosperity’. Compare McGrath , the usual Irish form of this surname.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas was born about 1332, in Cambuslang, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagard, was 25 and her mother, Joan Menteith, was 19. She married Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell on 23 July 1362. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1405, in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas est née environ 1332, à Cambuslang, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagard, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joan Menteith, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell le 23 juillet 1362. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1405, à Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas um 1332 in Cambuslang, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagard 25 und ihre Mutter Joan Menteith 19. Sie hat am 23. Juli 1362 Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1405 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas è nata il circa 1332 nel Cambuslang, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagard, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Joan Menteith, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell il 23 luglio 1362. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1405, nel Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Moray Countess of Douglasが約1332年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアカンブスランで生まれた時，父Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagardは25歳，母Joan Menteithは19歳であった。1362年7月23日にArchibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1405年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアボスウエルで75歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas(이)가 대략 1332년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 캄버슬랭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagard(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Menteith(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1362년 7월 23일 Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1405년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 벗웰에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas nasceu aproximadamente 1332, em Cambuslang, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagard, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joan Menteith, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell em 23 de julho de 1362. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1405, em Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas родилась около 1332 г. в местности камбусланг, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagard было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Menteith, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell 23 июля 1362 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1405 г. в местности ботвелл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

sm.about 1332–Abt 1405: e tusa o le 1332–e tusa o le 1405

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas nació aproximadamente 1332, en Cambuslang, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Maurice de Moravia 1st Earl of Strathearn, 3rd of Drumsagard, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joan Menteith, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell el 23 de julio de 1362. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1405, en Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
